name: ai-zippy-child/home-why
title: Home Why
description: Dark why-us grid section for the homepage.

description.default: Built on quality, precision, and reliability - we understand what trade professionals need.

cardOneText.default: Deep roots in Singapore's Sungei Kadut timber district with extensive supplier networks and market knowledge.

cardTwoText.default: Comprehensive catalogue from raw teak planks to WPC composites, handrails, T&G profiles, and adhesives.

cardThreeText.default: Highlight custom wood milling and cutting as a key selling point - your specs, our precision execution.

cardFourText.default: Seamless B2B enquiry process, mobile-optimised for contractors on-site, with dedicated trade pricing.
